description: High-energy songs with strong rhythm and motivating hooks.
Low-distraction tracks with steady mood and moderate tempo.
Cinematic and atmospheric songs for night listening.
Uplifting songs with momentum and sing-along value.
Dance-forward songs with immediate hooks and high energy.
Reflective tracks with warm, emotional tone.
Emotional songs focused on loss, healing, and introspection.
Bright and optimistic songs to start the day.
